channel.title: Retro Pixel Press
channel.description: Fresh takes for retro game collectors and speedrunners.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: crt setup guide
item.description: The persistent myths around crt setup guide, stress-tested against what retro game collectors and speedrunners actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your hardware in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying hardware project for retro game collectors — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: The state of Hardware in 2026
item.description: A field report on hardware: where things stand, and what retro game collectors and speedrunners should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Speedruns without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to speedruns for retro game collectors and speedrunners — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "retro game restoration" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "retro game restoration" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why retro game collectors are rethinking Preservation
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how retro game collectors and speedrunners approach preservation — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Indie on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in indie — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Speedruns: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping speedruns for retro game collectors and speedrunners.
